title: Multi-LLM Provider Unified Gateway
subtitle: Multi-Provider LLM Gateway
description: Integrate multiple LLM providers through a unified interface layer, enabling automatic routing from model names to providers, API key management, and request format adaptation. This reduces the cost of switching between models.
sub_problems: Automatic routing from model name to provider
best_practices: Use LiteLLM as a unified adapter layer, implementing model-to-provider mapping through a registry
Support gateway mode for centralized request forwarding, avoiding if-elif chain logic
